title: Job Opening Teacher at Aakash Educational Services

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Aakash Educational Services
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aakash Educational Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Aakash Educational Services:
Aakash Educational Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aakash Educational Services!
